tasks.label: inspect-spid-cert
args: set -e; CONF=/var/www/spid-cie-php/vendor/simplesamlphp/simplesamlphp/cert/spid-openssl.cnf; echo "IPA=$SPID_METADATA_IPA_CODE"; echo "PUBLIC=$SPID_CIE_PUBLIC_BASE_URL"; echo "--- current cert subject"; openssl x509 -in /var/www/spid-cie-php/vendor/simplesamlphp/simplesamlphp/cert/spid.crt -noout -subject; echo "--- current cert basic constraints"; openssl x509 -in /var/www/spid-cie-php/vendor/simplesamlphp/simplesamlphp/cert/spid.crt -noout -text | sed -n "1,120p"; echo "--- conf (if exists)"; ls -l "$CONF" 2>/dev/null || true; sed -n "1,140p" "$CONF" 2>/dev/null || true
